overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit buildings, holographic advertisements, wet reflective streets, and cherry blossom trees with colored lighting. The character descends through multiple plaza levels and ends with a time-lapse view of a highway from an overlook.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk commercial street with prominent purple vending machines and a large red '15% OFF' billboard. The camera moves forward, crossing a wet reflective street toward an open plaza lined with illuminated cherry blossom trees and futuristic glass towers.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an open plaza with outdoor cafe seating and illuminated trees, then descends a glass-railed staircase into a lower level. A pedestrian with a glowing yellow umbrella walks ahead as the environment transitions to a covered walkway with holographic display pillars.

segments.scene_description: The character explores a sunken cyberpunk plaza featuring circular white seating structures around large trees, with wet pavement reflecting vibrant teal and magenta neon lights. Holographic advertisements and digital billboards illuminate the semi-covered space as pedestrians walk through or sit on benches.

segments.scene_description: The scene abruptly shifts to a highway overlook at night, showing a multi-lane road below with time-lapse light trails from dense traffic. The Kang Tao building sign is visible in the distance, and tall apartment towers line the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a neon-lit commercial street through a multi-leveled cyberpunk plaza, ultimately ending at a high-altitude highway overlook. It begins by moving past purple vending machines and a red discount billboard, crossing a wet, reflective street toward an open plaza lined with illuminated cherry blossom trees and glass towers. As the camera progresses through outdoor cafe seating, it descends a glass-railed staircase past a pedestrian with a glowing yellow umbrella, transitioning into a covered walkway filled with holographic display pillars. The scene then opens into a sunken plaza where teal and magenta neon lights reflect off wet pavement around circular white seating and large trees, before shifting abruptly to a nighttime overlook. Finally, the perspective settles on a multi-lane highway featuring time-lapse light trails from dense traffic, with the Kang Tao building and tall apartment towers looming in the distance.
